data.text: I am disciplined. Structure is a shield and a cage. I am terrified of chaos.
if it doesn't hurt, it's not growth.
Every act of creativity is a leap. Every leap leaves a mar. Marks become information. Information connects in retrospect. Value is a function of traceable output. Act now. Assemble later.

tags: Doctors won’t make you healthy. Nutritionists won’t make you slim. Teachers won’t make you smart. Gurus won’t make you calm. Mentors won’t make you rich. Trainers won’t make you fit. Ultimately you have to take responsibility. Save yourself.
